creator: michelle@sorbs.net
text:
Still using the same options across all platforms I'm building on:

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for virtualbox-ose-4.3.12_2
_OPTIONS_READ=virtualbox-ose-4.3.12_2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DBUS DEBUG GUESTADDITIONS MANUAL NLS PULSEAUDIO PYTHON QT4 UDPTUNNEL VDE VNC VPX WEBSERVICE X11
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DBUS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GUESTADDITIONS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MANUAL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=NLS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PULSEAUDIO
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PYTHON
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=QT4
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=UDPTUNNEL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=VDE
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=VNC
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=VPX
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=WEBSERVICE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=X11
